'''Dacholder''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] known to his friends as '''Doc'''. He was a member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Space Rescue Corps|Search and Rescue Corps]].

==Biography==
Still young and affable, but [[Color/Legends|graying]] and balding early, he was assigned shortly after the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] to partner with [[Uldir Lochett]] aboard the ''[[Pride of Thela]]''; but he was also recruited by the [[Peace Brigade]], and tasked with capturing the former [[Jedi academy]] student.

When Dacholder's treachery became evident, Lochett calmly ejected him into [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and fled the trap.

{{Char-stub}}
